headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Digital Realty Trust, Raises Price Target to $210
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Cameron McVeigh   maintains Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $195 to $210.
